calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Teclehaimanot Teclemariam Tekeste in Propria Persona.

The Court questioned why the marriage certificate was needed and if the petitioner had any additional evidence such as the original marriage certificate. Mr. Teclehaimanot reported that he has photos and travel tickets, that he needs to officially record his change of status from single to married, that he has a certificate from the church in Sudan and that he needs this separate certificate for his own records. The Court asked if Mr. Teclehaimanot had anything else to provide and he responded that his father, who it here from Sudan, was at the wedding. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Yeung. (Not Reported)
